item.description: Cross-platform API testing client for humans. Painlessly test REST, GraphQL, and HTTP APIs

item.description: High quality, visual, open source tool to create, design, and edit database files compatible with SQLite

item.description: Lens is the most powerful IDE for Kubernetes developers and operators

item.description: A cross-platform, reimplementation of Notepad++

item.description: Open-source IDE for exploring and testing APIs

item.description: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC

item.description: The comfortable Git UI for Linux.

item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others

item.description: Native, lightweight, multiplatform and free HTTP client that you can use to test your APIs

item.description: appimagecraft completely automates the AppImage build process

item.description: Eclipse Theia is a cloud & desktop IDE framework implemented in TypeScript.

item.description: A modern, fast and productivity driven SQL client with a focus in UX

item.description: Fork of GitHub Desktop to support various Linux distributions

item.description: nRF Connect for Desktop is a cross-platform framework for desktop apps for development kits and dongles from Nordic Semiconductor

item.description: Yasumu is a customizable, free and open-source application to test various types of APIs

item.description: The GitButler version control client, backed by Git, powered by Tauri/Rust/Svelte.

item.title: XPipe
item.description: XPipe is a new type of shell connection hub and remote file manager that allows you to access your entire server infrastructure from your local machine
